zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Bidwell於大約1658年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德時，她的父親John Bidwell45歲，母親Sarah Wilcox42歲。她於1677年12月20日與John Wadham IV在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1696年6月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年39歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Bidwell于大约1658年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德时，她的父亲John Bidwell45岁，母亲Sarah Wilcox42岁。她于1677年12月20日与John Wadham IV在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1696年6月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年39岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Bidwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bedwell (Essex, Hertfordshire), Bedlar's Green (Essex), Bidwell (Bedfordshire, Northamptonshire, Devon, Somerset), or Biddles Farm (Buckinghamshire), all of which were named as ‘the spring or stream in a shallow valley’ from Old English bydewelle (composed of the elements byde(n) ‘tub’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’).

variants.name: Bodwell
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Bidwell   orpossibly   Bardwell  .

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Bidwell was born about 1658, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Bidwell, was 45 and her mother, Sarah Wilcox, was 42. She married John Wadham IV on 20 December 1677, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 June 1696, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 39, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Bidwell est née environ 1658, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Bidwell, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Sarah Wilcox, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé John Wadham IV le 20 décembre 1677, à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 juin 1696, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Bidwell um 1658 in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bidwell 45 und ihre Mutter Sarah Wilcox 42. Sie hat am 20. Dezember 1677 in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America John Wadham IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Juni 1696 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.Wethersfield, Hartford, Conneticut, USA: Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America
it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Bidwell è nata il circa 1658 nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Bidwell, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Sarah Wilcox, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato John Wadham IV il 20 dicembre 1677, nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 giugno 1696, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Bidwellが約1658年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで生まれた時，父John Bidwellは45歳，母Sarah Wilcoxは42歳であった。1677年12月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードでJohn Wadham IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1696年6月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで39歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Bidwell(이)가 대략 1658년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bidwell(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Wilcox(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1677년 12월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 John Wadham IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1696년 6월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Bidwell nasceu aproximadamente 1658, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Bidwell, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Wilcox, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com John Wadham IV em 20 de dezembro de 1677, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de junho de 1696, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Bidwell родилась около 1658 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Bidwell было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Wilcox, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wadham IV 20 декабря 1677 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 июня 1696 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.
